Bash(python3 -c "
import numpy as np
things = np.load\('/mnt/afs/250010218/Brain2Image/datasets/NSD/subj01_things.npy', allow_pickle=True\)
print\('Shape:', things.shape\)
# Count label distribution
from collections import Counter
flat_labels = []
for item in things:
    if isinstance\(item, \(list, np.ndarray\)\):
        for l in item:
            flat_labels.append\(str\(l\)\)
    else:
        flat_labels.append\(str\(item\)\)
c = Counter\(flat_labels\)
print\(f'Total unique labels: {len\(c\)}'\)
print\('Top 20 labels:'\)
for label, count in c.most_common\(20\):
    print\(f'  {label}: {count}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import lmdb
import pickle

# 检查多被试数据集的结构
db_path = 'datasets/processed/eeg_fmri_align_datasets/things_sub-01_nsd_sub-01_sub-02_sub-05_sub-07_no_things_test_250Hz'
db = lmdb.open\(db_path, readonly=True, lock=False\)
with db.begin\(\) as txn:
    # 读取元数据
    meta = pickle.loads\(txn.get\('meta_info'.encode\(\)\)\)
    print\('=== Metadata ==='\)
    print\(f\\"NSD subjects: {meta['nsd_subjects']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"fMRI take mean: {meta['fmri_take_mean']}\\"\)
    print\(\)
    
    # 读取第一个训练样本
    data = pickle.loads\(txn.get\('train_0'.encode\(\)\)\)
    print\('=== First training sample ==='\)
    print\(f\\"EEG shape: {data['eeg'].shape}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"Number of NSD subjects: {len\(data['nsd_data']\)}\\"\)
    for i, nd in enumerate\(data['nsd_data']\):
        print\(f\\"  Subject {i} \({nd['subject']}\): fMRI shape = {nd['fmri'].shape}\\"\)
db.close\(\)
" 2>&1 | head -30)

Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON_EOF'
import json

with open\('MindEyeV2/src/Train.ipynb', 'r'\) as f:
    notebook = json.load\(f\)

# Extract all code cells and their content
distributed_code_sections = []
for i, cell in enumerate\(notebook['cells']\):
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
        source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
        lower_source = source.lower\(\)
        if any\(keyword in lower_source for keyword in ['accelerat', 'rank', 'ddp', 'distributed', 'gpu', 'device', 'backward', 'scatter', 'gather', 'sync', 'barrier', 'prepare']\):
            distributed_code_sections.append\({
                'cell_id': i,
                'length': len\(source.split\('\\n'\)\),
                'has_accelerate': 'accelerat' in lower_source,
                'has_backward': 'backward' in lower_source,
                'has_rank': 'rank' in lower_source,
                'has_prepare': 'prepare' in lower_source,
                'has_world_size': 'world_size' in lower_source,
                'has_gather': 'gather' in lower_source,
            }\)

print\("DISTRIBUTED-RELATED CELLS:"\)
for section in distributed_code_sections:
    print\(f"\\nCell {section['cell_id']}: {section['length']} lines"\)
    print\(f"  - accelerate: {section['has_accelerate']}"\)
    print\(f"  - backward: {section['has_backward']}"\)
    print\(f"  - rank checks: {section['has_rank']}"\)
    print\(f"  - prepare: {section['has_prepare']}"\)
    print\(f"  - world_size: {section['has_world_size']}"\)
    print\(f"  - gather: {section['has_gather']}"\)

PYTHON_EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON_EOF'
import json

with open\('MindEyeV2/src/Train.ipynb', 'r'\) as f:
    notebook = json.load\(f\)

# Get cells 24, 26, 30, 31 which contain the key distributed training logic
target_cells = [24, 26, 30, 31]

for cell_idx in target_cells:
    cell = notebook['cells'][cell_idx]
    source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
    print\(f"\\n{'='*100}"\)
    print\(f"CELL {cell_idx}: Training/Distributed Setup Code"\)
    print\(f"{'='*100}\\n"\)
    print\(source\)

PYTHON_EOF)
